sglang.bodyExcerpt:

On DeepSeek-V4-Pro, MLA decode attention dispatches FlashMLA's slow fwd_for_small_topk::head128 kernel even under tensor parallelism. With attention-TP the per-rank query-head count is n_heads // attn_tp (128 / TP4 = 32), but MQALayer.forward pads it to the full global n_heads before the

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Unset HF's default max_new_tokens for DiffusionGemma
vllm.author: martin-kukla
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
DiffusionGemma model's generation_config.json sets default max_new_tokens to 256. The rationale being that the HuggingFace users should never hit OOMs when running the model. For vLLM implementation, we don't need to limit the max length by default in order to limit OOMs.
Test Plan
Run the m

vllm.title: (security) Enforce audio upload size limit before full file materialization
vllm.author: jperezdealgaba
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The speech-to-text routes (/v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/translations) called UploadFile.read() without bounds before checking VLLM_MAX_AUDIO_CLIP_FILESIZE_MB, allowing oversized uploads to fully materialize in memory before rejection. This adds a bounded chunked read that rejects over-limit f

vllm.title: Fix the E8M0 scale computation in the MXFP4 (W4A4) MOE CUTLASS kernel
vllm.author: xin3he
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix the E8M0 scale computation in the MXFP4 (W4A4) MOE CUTLASS kernel, which
currently produces severely incorrect quantization results.
Related PR: #37463
Root Cause
The original code computes the E8M0 scale factor via:
// Old (buggy):
float SFValue = vecMax * reciprocal_approximate_ftz(6.0

vllm.title: Remove redundant Triton KV cache dtype asserts and enforce architectural support (fp8 >= sm89)
vllm.author: mikekg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
On the Triton attention backend (TRITON_ATTN), an fp8 KV cache is stored via
current_platform.fp8_dtype() == float8_e4m3fn (Triton fp8e4nv), which has
no lowering before SM89; a bfloat16 KV cache needs native bf16 (SM80+).
Neither is caught early today: on older GPUs the engine loads and the

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Two-phase KV allocation for cross-group prefix cache hits (supersedes #33775)
vllm.author: Saddss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Hybrid models (e.g. Gemma-4) with local prefix hits + external KV could assign the same physical block twice: per-group touch → extend → get_new_blocks(external) let group i's external alloc evict group j's untouched hit blocks → bad ref_cnt / duplicate block IDs → downstream #43884 assert i

[DEG

vllm.title: [Model] Add MiniMax M3 support

Add MiniMax M3 model support across config, processors, model registry, AMD/NVIDIA model implementations, MTP, sparse attention, and warmup paths.
Add MiniMax M3 reasoning and tool parsers, including Rust frontend registrations and Python-facing parser wrappers.

vllm.title: [KV Offloading] Implement `reset_cache` for `TieringOffloadingManager`
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
TieringOffloadingManager didn't override reset_cache(), so engine resets left state stale.
The new override:

Drains in-flight primary↔secondary transfers before resetting primary state. Without it, an in-flight secondary→primary load could write into a reallocated primary slot, or a primary

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Chat Completions Harmony Refactor Clean up

Add ParserManager.get_parser is_harmony flag to to OpenAIServingRender (newly added in #45003). Doesn'

vllm.title: [Perf] Optimize DSv4 prefill chunk planning, 4.0% E2E Throughput Improvement

For example
seq_lens   = [256, 320, 448, 640, 1024, 1536, 3072, 4096, 6144, 8192]
query_lens = [4,   8,   8,   8,   16,   16,   32,   32,   32,   32]

compress_ratio = 4
window

Gate structural tag generation on strict: true when tool_choice="auto" — if no tool opts into strict schema enforcement, return None instead of constraining output
This prevents structural tags from over-cons

vllm.title: Fix parallel_tool_calls: null treated as false instead of default true
vllm.author: factnn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #44948: parallel_tool_calls: null was treated as false, trimming to a single tool call. The documented default is true, so explicit null should behave like the default.
Fix
Change truthiness check to explicit is not False:

None → keep all tool calls (default)
True → keep all tool call

vllm.title: [Frontend] Replace legacy Gemma4 parsers with engine-based implementation
vllm.author: bbrowning
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Migrate Gemma4 from separate hand-coded reasoning and tool parsers to the unified ParserEngine framework introduced for Qwen3. A single state machine in vllm/parser/gemma4.py now handles both channel-based reasoning extraction and custom tool call parsing with declarative configuration. The

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Defer block freeing until in-flight steps finish under async scheduling + PD KV consumer
vllm.author: llx-08
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR fixes a race in async scheduling with PD KV consumers by deferring the actual return of freed KV blocks to the block pool until the newest in-flight scheduled step has finished.
With async scheduling, the scheduler may dispatch step N+1 before step N's output is processed. If a reque

vllm.title: nixl_ep: Skip post-receive quantization for NVFP4
vllm.author: itayalroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After #44992, NIXL EP checks the current vLLM config to decide whether NVFP4 receive quantization should be skipped. That breaks when the receive path runs without a current config.
Instead of relying on --moe-backend, make the decision from the MoE quant dtype. This matches non-hybrid DeepEP low-la

vllm.title: [EP] Query NIXL EP top-k index dtype
vllm.author: itayalroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
NIXL EP can be built with different top-k index types. Query the dtype reported by the installed nixl_ep instead of hardcoding int64.
ai-dynamo/nixl#1751 changes the default NIXL EP top-k index type from 64-bit to 32-bit. Following nixl_ep.topk_idx_t keeps vLLM compatible with both the upstream defa

vllm.title: [EP] Enable DBO with NIXL EP
vllm.author: itayalroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
DBO works with NIXL EP because it supports async prepare/finalize, but the backend validation only allowed DeepEP backends.
Also add nixl_ep to the CUDA graph guidance for decode optimized all2all backends.
cc @tlrmchlsmth

vllm.bodyExcerpt:

FlashMLA doesn't support bfloat16, and FalshInfer doesn't support fp8_ds_mla

vllm.title: Register parsed config classes before tokenizer init

Register the already-parsed HF config class with AutoConfig before cached_tokenizer_from_config() reads the tokenizer config again.
This fixes #40249, where worker-side tokenizer init could still fail on qwen3_5_moe even though vLLM had already parsed the model config successfully.
Why this

This change enables the use of pinned memory for WSL2, and warnings have b
